description: Cursor-invocable subagents. Each file is synced to .cursor/agents/ and (with mcp__ prefix transform) to .claude/agents/. Orchestrator prompts invoke these via @agent-name mentions.

agents.name: implement-code
agents.description: Scope and implement the smallest meaningful subtask with tests and quality gate. Step 2 of the implement pipeline.

agents.name: commit-preflight
agents.description: Verify MCP health, load rules, confirm changes, pre-stage Synapse, create rollback snapshot.

agents.name: commit-phase-a
agents.description: Run run_quality_gate(), fix with autofix() (max 3 iterations), record coverage.

agents.name: commit-phase-b
agents.description: Update memory bank, archive completed plans, run run_docs_gate().

agents.name: commit-phase-c
agents.description: Validate timestamps, check roadmap/activeContext consistency, handle Synapse submodule commit+push.

agents.name: commit-final-gate
agents.description: Classify what changed since Phase A, re-run minimal quality gate, block commit if failed.

agents.name: fix-quality
agents.description: Fix type errors, formatting, linting, and markdown. autofix + run_quality_gate loop (max 3 iterations).

agents.name: fix-tests
agents.description: Diagnose and fix failing tests. PHASE 0 diagnosis required before edits. Skips for markdown-only scope.

agents.name: fix-docs
agents.description: Sync memory bank files, fix timestamps, resolve roadmap sync issues, validate run_docs_gate.

agents.name: review-static-analysis
agents.description: Run run_quality_gate(), parse type/lint/format/markdown results. Step 1.

agents.name: review-bugs
agents.description: Language-aware bug detection: runtime errors, logic flaws, anti-patterns. Step 2.

agents.name: review-consistency
agents.description: Cross-file consistency, SOLID/DRY/YAGNI, DI patterns, file/function size limits. Steps 3-4.

agents.name: review-completeness
agents.description: TODO/FIXME, placeholders, test coverage gaps, security vulnerabilities. Steps 5-7.

agents.name: review-performance
agents.description: Performance bottlenecks, regression check, score all 9 metrics, write code-review-report file. Steps 8-9.

agents.name: analyze-context
agents.description: Evaluate load_context effectiveness: token utilization, precision/recall, role budgets. Step 1.

agents.name: analyze-session
agents.description: Identify mistake patterns, root causes, Synapse recommendations, multi-goal scope risk. Step 2.

agents.name: analyze-tools
agents.description: Audit MCP tool budget (<=40 target), dead tools, duplicates, consolidation candidates. Step 3.

agents.name: analyze-compact
agents.description: Assemble report, route findings to plans/skills/rules, compact memory bank, enforce markdown lint. Step 4.

agents.name: plan-creator
agents.description: Create plan file with all required sections and YAML frontmatter, register in roadmap.

shared.description: Reference-only files not directly invoked as subagents.

files.name: shared-defaults
files.description: Shared quality thresholds and conventions referenced by subagents.
